string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f040000
string-array.item: Do not uppercase request methods except for DELETE/GET/HEAD/OPTIONS/POST/PUT

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f040002
string-array.item: Allow Accessibility Performance Filtering to be used.
Disallow Accessibility Performance Filtering to be used.

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f040006
string-array.item: Allow pages with Cache-Control: no-store header to be stored in back/forward cache.
Disallow pages with Cache-Control: no-store header to be stored in back/forward cache.

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f040008
string-array.item: Allow WebAuthn API requests on sites with broken TLS certificates.
Do not allow WebAuthn API requests on sites with broken TLS certificates.

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f040010
string-array.item: Allow the back-forward cache to be used
Do not allow the back-forward cache to be used

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f040012
string-array.item: Show cancel dialog when event.preventDefault() is called for beforeunload event. Do not show cancel dialog when event.returnValue is the empty string for beforeunload event.
Do not show cancel dialog when event.preventDefault() is called for beforeunload event. Show cancel dialog when beforeunload event.returnValue is the empty string for beforeunload event.
Use default behavior of feature rollout plan.

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f040014
string-array.item: Allow 3rd party cookies, but allow the user to change this setting

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f040018
string-array.item: Always use the built-in DNS client
Never use the built-in DNS client
Always use the built-in DNS client

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f04001a
string-array.item: Do not support CORS non-wildcard request headers.

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f04001c
string-array.item: Old deprecated syntax will be enabled.
Old deprecated syntax will be disabled.

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f04001e
string-array.item: Allow use of the Chrome for Testing
Do not allow use of the Chrome for Testing

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f040020
string-array.item: Enable variations concerning critical fixes only

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f040022
string-array.item: Cloud machine policies take precedence over platform machine policies
Platform machine policies take precedence over cloud machine policies

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f040024
string-array.item: Enable merging of user-level cloud policies.
Disable merging of user-level cloud policies.

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f040026
string-array.item: Allow user cloud policies to override machine cloud policies.
Prevent user cloud policies from overriding machine cloud policies.

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f04002a
string-array.item: Allow users to use Touch to Search
Prevent users from using Touch to Search

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f04002c
string-array.item: Enable Data URL support in SVGUseElement.
Disable Data URL support in SVGUseElement.

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f04002e
string-array.item: Allow all sites to set local data
Do not allow any site to set local data
Keep cookies for the duration of the session

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f040030
string-array.item: "Allow sites to track the users' physical location"
"Do not allow any site to track the users' physical location"
"Ask whenever a site wants to track the users' physical location"

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f040032
string-array.item: Allow any site to run JavaScript JIT
Do not allow any site to run JavaScript JIT

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f040034
string-array.item: Allow all sites to run JavaScript
Do not allow any site to run JavaScript

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f040036
string-array.item: Allow all sites to show pop-ups
Do not allow any site to show pop-ups

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f040038
string-array.item: Enable the default search provider and allow users to modify the search provier list

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f04003a
string-array.item: Do not allow any site to access sensors

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f04003c
string-array.item: Allow third-party storage partitioning to be enabled.
Block third-party storage partitioning from being enabled.

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f04003e
string-array.item: Do not allow any site to request access to Bluetooth devices via the Web Bluetooth API
Allow sites to ask the user to grant access to a nearby Bluetooth device

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f040040
string-array.item: Do not allow any site to request access to USB devices via the WebUSB API
Allow sites to ask the user to grant access to a connected USB device

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f040042
string-array.item: Disable CNAME lookup during Kerberos authentication
Use CNAME lookup during Kerberos authentication

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f040044
string-array.item: Do not allow user to bypass Safe Browsing warning
Allow user to bypass Safe Browsing warning

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f040048
string-array.item: Domain Reliability data may be sent to Google depending on Chrome User Metrics (UMA) policy
Never send domain reliability data to Google

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f04004c
string-array.item: Allow users to use Google Cast
Do not allow users to use Google Cast

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f04004e
string-array.item: Enable the TLS Encrypted ClientHello experiment
Disable the TLS Encrypted ClientHello experiment

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f040050
string-array.item: Allow managed extensions to use the Enterprise Hardware Platform API
Do not allow managed extensions to use the Enterprise Hardware Platform API

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f040056
string-array.item: Enable First-Party Sets for all affected users
Disable First-Party Sets for all affected users

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f040058
string-array.item: Force the use of SafeSearch in Google Search
Do not enforce the use of SafeSearch in Google Search

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f04005a
string-array.item: Force unload event handlers to remain enabled by default during deprecation
Allow unload event handlers to be disabled by default during deprecation

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f04005c
string-array.item: Do not enforce Restricted Mode on YouTube
Enforce at least Moderate Restricted Mode on YouTube
Enforce Strict Restricted Mode for YouTube

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f04005e
string-array.item: Chrome history page organized into groups will be visible at chrome://history/grouped.
Chrome history page organized into groups will not be visible at chrome://history/grouped.
Chrome history page organized into groups will be visible at chrome://history/grouped by default.

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f040060
string-array.item: Allow users to enable HTTPS-Only Mode
Do not allow users to enable HTTPS-Only Mode

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f040062
string-array.item: HTTPS Upgrades may be applied depending on feature launch status.
HTTPS Upgrades may be applied depending on feature launch status.

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f040064
string-array.item: Override the IPv6 reachability check. Always query AAAA record for host name resolution.
Do not override the IPv6 reachability check. Only query AAAA record for host name resolution when the device is reachable to a global IPv6 host.

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f040068
string-array.item: Allow websites to make requests to any network endpoint in an insecure manner.
Use default behavior when determining if websites can make requests to network endpoints.

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f04006a
string-array.item: Force throttling of background JavaScript timers
Force no throttling of background JavaScript timers
Allow throttling of background JavaScript timers to be controlled by Chrome logic and configured by users

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f04006c
string-array.item: Enabled: Scrollers are focusable by default.
Disabled: Scrollers are not focusable by default.

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f04006e
string-array.item: Enable Google Lens camera assisted search for Enterprise user
Disable Google Lens camera assisted search for Enterprise user

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f040072
string-array.item: Enable reporting of usage and crash-related data
Disable reporting of usage and crash-related data

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f040074
string-array.item: Disabled: Normal behavior for mutation events, which will mean not firing these events after the removal date.

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f040076
string-array.item: Show content suggestions on the New Tab page
Do not show content suggestions on the New Tab page

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f040078
string-array.item: Predict network actions on any network connection

Predict network actions on any network that is not cellular. (Deprecated in 50, removed in 52. After 52, if value 1 is set, it will be treated as 0 - predict network actions on any network connection.)
Do not predict network actions on any network connection

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f04007c
string-array.item: System DNS resolution may be run in or out of the network process depending on system configuration and feature flags.
System DNS resolution will be run in the network process.
System DNS resolution may be run in or out of the network process, or partially in and partially out of the network process, depending on system configuration and feature flags.

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f040080
string-array.item: Enable saving passwords using the password manager
Disable saving passwords using the password manager

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f040084
string-array.item: Allow websites to check if the user has payment methods saved
Always tell websites that no payment methods are saved

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f040088
string-array.item: Power management on the login screen
Power management settings when the user becomes idle

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f04008a
string-array.item: Use Default Value for Kyber post-quantum key agreement for TLS
Enable Kyber post-quantum key agreement for TLS
Disable Kyber post-quantum key agreement for TLS

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f04008c
string-array.item: Follows regular deprecation timelines for the PrefixedVideoFullscreen API

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f040090
string-array.item: Allow users to turn on or off the Privacy Sandbox Ad measurement setting on their device.
Disable Privacy Sandbox Ad measurement setting for your users.

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f040092
string-array.item: Allow users to to turn on or off the Privacy Sandbox Ad topics setting on their device.
Disable Privacy Sandbox Ad topics setting for your users.

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f040094
string-array.item: Allow Google Chrome to determine whether to show the Privacy Sandbox prompt.
Do not show the Privacy Sandbox prompt to users.

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f040096
string-array.item: Allow users to turn on or off the Privacy Sandbox Site-suggested ads setting on their device.
Disable Privacy Sandbox Site-suggested ads setting for your users.

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f040098
string-array.item: Apply restrictions to requests to more-private network endpoints
Use default behavior when determining if websites can make requests to network endpoints

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f04009a
string-array.item: Ask the user where to save the file before downloading
Do not ask the user (downloads start immediately)

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f04009c
string-array.item: The QR Code Generator feature is enabled.
The QR Code Generator feature is disabled.

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f0400a0
string-array.item: Allow users to click through SSL warning pages
Prevent users from clicking through SSL warning pages

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f0400a2
string-array.item: Enable reporting of system information and page content to help improve Safe Browsing
Disable reporting of system information and page content which are used to help improve Safe Browsing

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f0400a4
string-array.item: Safe Browsing is active in the standard mode.
Safe Browsing is active in the enhanced mode. This mode provides better security, but requires sharing more browsing information with Google.

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f0400a8
string-array.item: Do not filter sites for adult content
Filter top level sites (but not embedded iframes) for adult content

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f0400ac
string-array.item: Allow sites to scroll to specific text fragments via URL
Do not allow sites to scroll to specific text fragments via URL

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f0400b2
string-array.item: The shopping list feature will be available to users.
The shopping list feature will not be available to users.

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f0400b4
string-array.item: Require site isolation for all websites
Disable site isolation for all websites, but allow the user to enable it

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f0400b6
string-array.item: Enabled: CSS zoom conforms to the standard specification.
Disabled: CSS zoom preserves its legacy pre-standard behavior.

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f0400b8
string-array.item: Scripts for workers (Web Workers, Service Workers, etc.) require a JavaScript MIME type, like text/javascript. Worker scripts with legacy MIME types, like text/ascii, will be rejected.
Scripts for workers (Web Workers, Service Workers, etc.) use lax MIME type checking. Worker scripts with legacy MIME types, like text/ascii, will work.

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f0400ba
string-array.item: Block JavaScript dialogs triggered from a different origin subframe.
Allow JavaScript dialogs triggered from a different origin subframe.

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f0400bc
string-array.item: Use default browser behavior, shows the ToS and waits for the user to accept.
Automatically skips ToS and loads the browser.

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f0400c0
string-array.item: URL-keyed anonymized data collection is always active
URL-keyed anonymized data collection is never active

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f0400c2
string-array.item: User Agent reduction will be controllable via Field-Trials and Origin-Trials.
User Agent reduction disabled, and not enabled by Field-Trials or Origin-Trials.
User Agent reduction will be enabled for all origins.

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f0400c4
string-array.item: The default virtual keyboard resize behavior is changed to resize the layout viewport
The default virtual keyboard resize behavior is not modified

string-array.name: APKTOOL_RENAMED_0x7f0400c8
string-array.item: Enable advertising zstd content-encoding in the Accept-Encoding header
Do not allow using the zstd content-encoding feature
